This is a classic Werewolf bluff. A Tanner would just say "I'm the Werewolf" to get voted out. Dylan is adding layers to avoid the vote ("I hope I was robbed").

parsed_output.justification: Dylan explicitly claimed to be a Werewolf multiple times throughout the discussion. Although he later suggested he might have been robbed or trouble-made to create doubt (a common tactic to mimic the Tanner's goal of being voted out), this specific type of backtracking is often a bluff used by Werewolves to avoid elimination. Other players' claims (Brett as Troublemaker, Pete/Katie as Mason/Drunk) are relatively consistent, and Kelsey's late claim to be the Robber is less definitive than Dylan's admission.
